description: Top national issues — derived from NOI Polls data and Premium Times headlines. Heuristic, not measured.
notes: These rankings are derived from poll findings and headline counts in collected data, NOT from systematic issue-coding. Flag: derived_heuristic.

data.note: Rolling weekly data not available — only point-in-time poll data retrieved. See NOI Polls approval ratings for monthly trend.

top_10_issues.evidence: NOI Polls: 33% cite cost of living as top problem; 88% say economy bad; 85% oppose subsidy removal
NOI Polls: security 24% of wrong-track mentions
85% disapprove subsidy removal; politically dominant since May 2023
NOI Polls: bad governance 15% of wrong-track mentions; 93% say wrong direction (fuel subsidy poll)
Ongoing litigation; 2023 election controversies; FCT 2026 election
Naira float June 2023; import costs; visible in Premium Times headlines
NOI Polls Jul 2024: yearlong trend of inadequate power
APC endorsement of Tinubu; ADC formation; opposition coalition
Ongoing economic disruption in SE; political implications for 2027
